description: This HTML file provides the user interface for a database visualizer application, including layout, styling, and client-side JavaScript for interacting with a backend API to load databases, tables, and data.

methods.name: loadDatabases
methods.description: Fetches the list of databases from the API and populates the sidebar.

methods.name: refreshDatabases
methods.description: Refreshes the database list, resets current selections, and updates UI.

methods.name: toggleDatabase
methods.description: Expands or collapses a database entry to show or hide its tables.

methods.name: loadTables
methods.description: Loads tables for a selected database and displays them.

methods.name: loadTableData
methods.description: Fetches data from a specific table and renders it within the main content area.

methods.name: renderTable
methods.description: Creates an HTML table of data for display.

methods.name: renderCell
methods.description: Renders an individual cell in the data table, with special handling for objects, long strings, and nulls.

methods.name: expandCell
methods.description: Expands or collapses cell content to show full data.
